languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

languages.text: "Машинные духи священных аппаратов Сектора Бионика выбиваются из сил. Выдвигаю срочный запрос на увеличение количества членов Адептус Механикус на корабле".
"The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."
languages.original_text: "Машинные духи священных аппаратов Сектора Бионика выбиваются из сил. Выдвигаю срочный запрос на увеличение количества членов Адептус Механикус на корабле".

traits.locale_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."
"The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."
"The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械の機械霊は限界を超えて疲弊している。この船に機械神殿の構成員を増員する緊急要請を発する」
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカの聖なる機械の機械霊は限界を超えて疲弊している。この船に機械神殿の構成員を増員する緊急要請を発する。」

languages.text: « Les esprits de la machine qui résident dans les appareils sacrés du secteur Bionica sont à bout de force. Je demande expressément à ce que les effectifs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus soient augmentés de toute urgence à bord du vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: « Les esprits de la machine qui résident dans les appareils sacrés du secteur Bionica sont à bout de force. Je demande expressément à ce que les effectifs de l'Adeptus Mechanicus soient augmentés de toute urgence à bord du vaisseau. »

languages.text: "Die Maschinengeister der heiligen Apparaturen des Sektor Bionica sind über alle Maßen belastet. Ich bitte nachhaltig um die Erhöhung der Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus auf dem Schiff."
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: "Die Maschinengeister der heiligen Apparaturen des Sektor Bionica sind über alle Maßen belastet. Ich bitte nachhaltig um die Erhöhung der Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus auf dem Schiff."

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'nın kutsal cihazlarının makine ruhları ölçüsüzce zorlanıyor. Gemideki Adeptus Mechanicus mensuplarının sayısının artırılması için acil talep gönderilmekte."
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'nın kutsal cihazlarının makine ruhları ölçüsüzce zorlanıyor. Gemideki Adeptus Mechanicus mensuplarının sayısının artırılması için acil talep gönderilmekte."

languages.text: «Los espíritus máquina de los sagrados aparatos del Sector Bionica están forzados por encima de sus límites. Solicito urgentemente incrementar el número de miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus en la nave».
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: «Los espíritus máquina de los sagrados aparatos del Sector Bionica están forzados por encima de sus límites. Solicito urgentemente incrementar el número de miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus en la nave».

languages.text: “仿生区神圣装置的机魂已近枯竭，现紧急请求增派机械修会成员登舰。”
languages.original_text: "The machine spirits of the sacred apparatuses of the Sector Bionica are strained beyond measure. Issuing an urgent request to increase the number of Adeptus Mechanicus members on the ship."

traits.locale_text: “仿生区神圣装置的机魂已近枯竭，现紧急请求增派机械修会成员登舰。”
